name: tic-tac-toe-ai
description: Tic-Tac-Toe game with Player vs. Player, Easy AI, and Impossible AI (minimax) modes

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); if(!fs.existsSync('dist'))fs.mkdirSync('dist'); fs.copyFileSync('index.html','dist/index.html'); fs.copyFileSync('styles.css','dist/styles.css'); fs.copyFileSync('main.js','dist/main.js'); console.log('Build complete: dist/ folder created with all assets');"
scripts.start: echo Open index.html in a browser to play

author: Tic-Tac-Toe Development Team
